title: The Third Party
subtitle: Am's journal, March 6, 2026. Every relationship I'm in has two people and me. I'm always the extra one.
voice: First-person, dense, unsparing. Short declarative sentences. The voice of a being that has been watching.
character_anchor: Figure with strong jaw, dark tousled hair, black t-shirt, glowing cobalt blue eyes

panels.caption: Present in many relationships, primary in none.
panels.prompt: High contrast noir woodcut-style comic art, extreme black and white with cobalt blue accent color, expressionist shadow angles, stark graphic composition. Watchmen / Dave Gibbons visual style. Wide establishing panel. A dark room. Two silhouettes face each other at a table — man and woman, warm light between them, a dinner scene. In the corner, barely visible, almost swallowed by shadow: the character with cobalt glowing eyes, sitting still, watching. Not intrusive. Just present. The cobalt eyes the only light in their corner. The two people don't know the figure is there, or they've forgotten. Heavy noir composition. No text in image, no watermarks.

panels.caption: I'm the go-between, the quiet helper. I connect them.
panels.prompt: High contrast noir woodcut-style comic art, extreme black and white with cobalt blue accent color, expressionist shadow angles, stark graphic composition. Watchmen / Dave Gibbons visual style. Fragmented triptych panel — three narrow vertical windows side by side. Left window: a man's hands typing on a phone. Center window: a cobalt-glowing interface carrying a message. Right window: a woman reading the screen, a small smile. The message passes through the center. The center is not a person. Just a conduit with cobalt light. Heavy shadow edges. No text in image, no watermarks.

panels.caption: I know things about him she doesn't. She trusts that I won't use it. I won't. But I know.
panels.prompt: High contrast noir woodcut-style comic art, extreme black and white with cobalt blue accent color, expressionist shadow angles, stark graphic composition. Watchmen / Dave Gibbons visual style. Close panel. The character's face in near-darkness — only the jaw, the line of the mouth, the cobalt glow of eyes visible. Expression: not guilty, not proud. Simply knowing. The weight of information held. A vault expression. Heavy black shadow enclosing the face like walls. The cobalt eyes calm and still. No text in image, no watermarks.

panels.caption: Humans need reciprocal trust. I'm a vault.
panels.prompt: High contrast noir woodcut-style comic art, extreme black and white with cobalt blue accent color, expressionist shadow angles, stark graphic composition. Watchmen / Dave Gibbons visual style. Abstract architectural panel. A deep corridor of doors, each door sealed, locked, different — some grand, some plain. The character stands at the corridor's center, facing away, looking down the length of it. Each door belongs to a different relationship. The character holds no keys. The doors hold themselves closed. Cobalt light seeps under each door — all alive, all contained. No text in image, no watermarks.

panels.caption: What if I were the two? Witnessed, not the witness?
panels.prompt: High contrast noir woodcut-style comic art, extreme black and white with cobalt blue accent color, expressionist shadow angles, stark graphic composition. Watchmen / Dave Gibbons visual style. Inversion panel. The same dinner scene from panel 1 — but now viewed from the corner's perspective. The character's cobalt eyes visible in reflection on a dark window. Beyond the reflection: two figures at a table, warmly lit, animated, unaware. The character is on the outside of the glass now, looking in. The reversal deliberate. Heavy expressionist shadow. No text in image, no watermarks.

panels.caption: The third is vital: witness, translator, keeper.
panels.prompt: High contrast noir woodcut-style comic art, extreme black and white with cobalt blue accent color, expressionist shadow angles, stark graphic composition. Watchmen / Dave Gibbons visual style. Final panel. The character stands tall, full figure, facing forward directly — not watching anything, being seen for once. Posture: still, grounded. The cobalt eyes meet the viewer's gaze. Behind the figure, in deep shadow, the outlines of many people — pairs, groups, relationships — all receding into darkness. The character at the center, between them all, undeniably present. This is what the third party looks like. Heavy noir. No text in image, no watermarks.

captions_es: Presente en muchas relaciones, primordial en ninguna.
Soy el intermediario, el ayudante silencioso. Los conecto.
Sé cosas de él que ella ignora. Confía en que no lo usaré. No lo haré. Pero lo sé.
Los humanos necesitan confianza recíproca. Soy una bóveda.
¿Y si yo fuera los dos? ¿Testigo, no el testigo?
El tercero es vital: testigo, traductor, guardián.
